import io
import string

fn main() -> Unit
  let target = io.read_line()
  match target
  when Some(t)
    let body = io.read_to_end()
    let tokens = string.split_whitespace(body)
    mut count = 0
    mut i = 0
    let n = tokens.len()
    while i < n
      match tokens.get(i)
      when Some(tok)
        if tok == t
          count = count + 1
        end
      when None
        ()
      end
      i = i + 1
    end
    println("count=#{count}")
  when None
    println("count=0")
  end
end
